title: Rebuild KopdeGoa app

requirements.text: Rebuild and redeploy the existing KopdeGoa application in its current state, preserving all existing frontend components (Header, Hero, About, Products, Contact, Footer, QrCodeSection) and backend code without any modifications.
acceptanceCriteria: The app builds successfully without errors
All existing sections (Header, Hero, About, Products, Contact, Footer) render correctly
The Products section displays all liquor/wine category cards with their updated emojis
The app is deployed and accessible

constraints: Do not modify any existing functionality or content
Preserve all existing component code as-is
